title: Rock River Renegades
writer: John Vlahos, Earle Snell, Faith Thomas
actors: Ray Corrigan, John 'Dusty' King, Max Terhune
plot: Recently elected Marshal Luke Graham falls under suspicion when he's unable to discover the local band of rustlers, which are really led by Jim Dawson, who is also trying to steal Grace Ross, daughter of the local newspaper editor.
